visual_description: A man in a beige jacket walks down a narrow hallway flanked by storefronts, glancing at his wristwatch while another man in a patterned shirt follows behind. The camera then cuts to a close-up of a man with a shaved head looking intently at fish swimming in aquariums lined up along a wall. The scene is dimly lit with artificial lighting, and the men appear focused on their respective tasks.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice speaking in a neutral tone with a moderate pace and pitch, accompanied by a consistent background noise.
